title: Select Qimen ju by Chaibu or Zhirun

positions.summary: Use the frozen solar-term and three-yuan Chaibu table.
Apply an intercalation method with additional term-distance and correction rules.

default_policy.rationale: Only Chaibu is implemented and tested; Zhirun remains reference-only.

user_disclosure: This foundation uses Chaibu; Zhirun and other ju methods are not calculated.
